description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with two distinct units side by side, each with its own entry door and balcony. The left unit is clad in light blue siding and is adorned with a lush green vertical garden on the upper balcony, while the right unit is finished in dark gray siding with a more minimalistic balcony. Both units have flat roofs, with the left unit's rooftop area featuring wooden planters and outdoor seating, and the right unit's rooftop left open and unadorned. Large rectangular windows are symmetrically arranged on both floors, providing ample natural light to the interiors. The balconies and rooftop terraces are enclosed by white railings, and the main entryways are simple, arched doors. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with clean lines and a focus on outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern, two-unit house with flat roofs, large windows, and private balconies, featuring both lush greenery and minimalist design elements. The exterior combines light blue and dark gray siding with white railings and rooftop terraces.
description_view_0: Front view showing both units, their entry doors, balconies, and the prominent vertical garden on the left unit.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the balconies and rooftop terraces, with the green artificial grass visible on the right unit's balcony.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the symmetrical window arrangement and the plain siding, with no visible entryways.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rooftop terrace with planters and seating on the left unit, and the open balcony on the right unit.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple arched doors with no steps, each unit featuring a balcony above and white railings; the left entry is accented by a vertical garden.
